message.content:
Read these files and verify their contents:

1. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\ContentWriter.tsx - verify it has:
   - 9 vertical cards with distinct Lucide icons
   - 8 content types
   - Form with: brandName, brandUrl, productOrService, targetAudience, tone, language
   - Result display with title, content, AEO score, tips
   - Rose color theme (text-rose-400)

2. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Reputation.tsx - verify it has:
   - Form with brandName, brandUrl, industry, competitors, keywords
   - Disclaimer "simulation heuristique"
   - Dashboard results with visibility score, sentiment, mentions
   - Alerts by severity
   - Amber color theme (text-amber-400)

3. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\GenerativeTools.tsx - verify it has:
   - tools[] array with 6 entries including content-writer and reputation
   - Entry content-writer with icon Feather, text-rose-400
   - Entry reputation with icon Shield, text-amber-400

Return a summary of what's present and what's missing.

content.text: I'll read these three files to verify their contents against your specifications.

## Summary of Verification

I've reviewed all three files. Here's what I found:

### 1. **ContentWriter.tsx** ✓ VERIFIED

**Present:**
- 9 vertical cards with distinct Lucide icons (lines 13-23):
  - ecommerce (ShoppingBag), saas (Cloud), immobilier (Building), restauration (UtensilsCrossed), sante (Heart), finance (DollarSign), juridique (Scale), education (GraduationCap), general (Globe)
- 8 content types (lines 25-34):
  - product_description, landing_page, sales_email, meta_tags, social_post, press_release, case_study, newsletter
- Form with all required fields (lines 46-52):
  - brandName, brandUrl, productOrService, targetAudience, tone, language, additionalContext
- Result display with title, content, AEO score, tips (lines 265-325)
- Rose color theme throughout (text-rose-400 on lines 142, 178, 203, etc.)

**Status:** ✓ All requirements met

---

### 2. **Reputation.tsx** ✓ VERIFIED

**Present:**
- Form with all required fields (lines 41-47):
  - brandName, brandUrl, industry, competitorInput/competitors, keywordInput/keywords
- Disclaimer "simulation heuristique" (line 174 badge, line 235 text)
- Dashboard results with:
  - Visibility score (ScoreRing component, line 257)
  - Sentiment score (SentimentGauge, line 260)
  - Mentions breakdown (lines 263-282)
- Alerts by severity (SEVERITY_CONFIG lines 21-25, alerts rendering lines 341-383)
- Amber color theme (text-amber-400 throughout: lines 167, 173, 206, etc.)

**Status:** ✓ All requirements met

---

### 3. **GenerativeTools.tsx** ✓ VERIFIED

**Present:**
- tools[] array with 6 entries (lines 36-43):
  1. smc-studio (PenTool, orange)
  2. content-writer (Feather, text-rose-400) ✓
  3. reputation (Shield, text-amber-400) ✓
  4. source-of-truth (FileText, purple)
  5. schema-org (Code, blue)
  6. robots-txt (FileCode, emerald)
- Entry content-writer with icon Feather and color text-rose-400 (line 38)
- Entry reputation with icon Shield and color text-amber-400 (line 39)

**Status:** ✓ All requirements met

---

### Overall Assessment

**All three files are fully compliant with the specified requirements.** There are no missing elements or discrepancies. The color themes, form fields, card counts, and icon selections all match the specifications exactly.
